channel.title: NAKR Hochstatter, WZ Akhtar, S Dietz, K Pe-Romashko, DH Gustafson, DV Shah, S Krechel, C Liebert, R Miller, N El-Bassel, RP Westergaard | PlatCOVID

item.title: Potential Influences of the COVID-19 Pandemic on Drug Use and HIV Care Among People Living with HIV and Substance Use Disorders: Experience from a Pilot mHealth Intervention.
